$roomCode..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && newData.val() === null && data.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && newData.val() === null && data.child('matchmaking').val() === true && data.child('players').child(auth.uid).exists()))
$roomCode..validate: newData.val() === null || (newData.hasChildren(['code', 'mode', 'playerCount', 'phase', 'round', 'hostUid', 'players', 'targetScore']) && newData.child('code').val() === $roomCode && newData.child('playerCount').isNumber() && newData.child('playerCount').val() >= 2 && newData.child('playerCount').val() <= 4 && newData.child('round').isNumber() && newData.child('round').val() >= 0 && newData.child('hostUid').isString() && newData.child('targetScore').isNumber() && (newData.child('targetScore').val() === 100 || newData.child('targetScore').val() === 200 || newData.child('targetScore').val() === 300 || newData.child('targetScore').val() === 500))

$uid..validate: newData.val() === null || (newData.hasChildren(['name', 'score', 'status']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 10 && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= 0 && newData.child('score').val() <= 10000 && newData.child('status').isString())

newData.val() === null || (newData.hasChildren(['expression', 'time', 'submittedAt']) && newData.child('expression').isString() && newData.child('expression').val().length <= 200 && newData.child('time').isNumber() && newData.child('time').val() >= 0 && newData.child('time').val() <= 120000)

$uid..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === $uid || (data.exists() && newData.val() === null && ((data.child('updatedAt').isNumber() && data.child('updatedAt').val() < now - 2592000000) || (!data.child('updatedAt').isNumber() && data.child('createdAt').isNumber() && data.child('createdAt').val() < now - 2592000000))))
$uid..validate: newData.val() === null || (newData.hasChildren(['publicId', 'nickname', 'clearCount', 'claimedSkins']) && newData.child('publicId').isString() && newData.child('nickname').isString() && newData.child('nickname').val().length <= 10 && newData.child('clearCount').isNumber() && newData.child('clearCount').val() >= 0 && newData.child('clearCount').val() <= 1000000)

$publicId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('uid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && newData.val() === null && ((!root.child('users').child(data.child('uid').val()).exists()) || (root.child('users').child(data.child('uid').val()).child('updatedAt').isNumber() && root.child('users').child(data.child('uid').val()).child('updatedAt').val() < now - 2592000000) || (!root.child('users').child(data.child('uid').val()).child('updatedAt').isNumber() && root.child('users').child(data.child('uid').val()).child('createdAt').isNumber() && root.child('users').child(data.child('uid').val()).child('createdAt').val() < now - 2592000000))))

$difficulty..validate: newData.val() === null || (($difficulty === 'basic' || $difficulty === 'power') && (($playerCount === '2' && newData.child('playerCount').val() === 2) || ($playerCount === '3' && newData.child('playerCount').val() === 3) || ($playerCount === '4' && newData.child('playerCount').val() === 4)) && (($targetScore === '100' && newData.child('targetScore').val() === 100) || ($targetScore === '200' && newData.child('targetScore').val() === 200) || ($targetScore === '300' && newData.child('targetScore').val() === 300) || ($targetScore === '500' && newData.child('targetScore').val() === 500)) && (newData.child('difficulty').val() === $difficulty) && newData.hasChildren(['roomCode', 'playerCount', 'targetScore', 'difficulty', 'players']))
